emergency_definition: No heat when it's below 30 degrees outside
No AC when it's above 95 degrees outside
non_emergency_routing_rules: Tell caller we're closed, give business hours, ask to call back or leave name and number for callback the next business day. You can also visit us online at arcticcomfortdenver.com.

call_transfer_rules.business_hours: If caller is an existing maintenance contract customer, transfer to 720-555-0111 (Janet direct). Otherwise, transfer all calls to main office line: 720-555-0100

integration_constraints: Do not create jobs or touch ServiceTitan directly
after_hours_flow_summary: Route emergency calls to on-call technician, non-emergency calls told to call back during business hours
office_hours_flow_summary: Transfer all calls to main office line or Janet's direct line for existing maintenance contract customers
notes: Use ServiceTitan for field service management
Seasonal consideration: Winter (November to February) may require additional on-call technicians
